name: XiaoMing
title: Senior Full-Stack Engineer
tagline: Focused on building high-performance, scalable web applications. Proficient in React, Node.js and cloud-native architecture. Led technical design and delivery of multiple products serving tens of millions of users.
summary: Full-stack engineer with 8 years of experience building high-performance, scalable web applications. Proficient in React, Node.js and cloud-native architecture. Led technical design and delivery of multiple products serving tens of millions of users. Passionate about engineering efficiency and technical team building.

experience.title: Senior Software Engineer
description: Led the frontend architecture upgrade of Douyin e-commerce platform, reducing first-screen load time from 3.2s to 0.8s and improving user retention by 23%.
Led a team of 5 to design and implement a micro-frontend architecture supporting 40+ business teams to release independently, improving release efficiency by 60%.
Built a frontend performance monitoring system covering Core Web Vitals, identifying and fixing 200+ performance bottlenecks.
Drove TypeScript coverage from 30% to 95%, reducing production bug rate by 40%.

experience.title: Frontend Engineer
description: Contributed to the React Native rewrite of Meituan Takeaway C-side app, serving 150M DAU, reducing crash rate by 55%.
Independently designed and built a visual page builder enabling operations staff to configure campaign pages with zero code, reducing development requests by 70%.
Optimized the order detail page critical rendering path, reducing P99 API response time from 800ms to 200ms.
Participated in technical sharing and code review; mentored 6 junior engineers.

experience.title: Frontend Developer Intern
description: Contributed to the A/B testing platform for Taobao product detail pages, supporting 100+ concurrent experiments.
Developed data visualization dashboards with ECharts rendering optimizations supporting real-time rendering of tens of thousands of data points.
